gaps_selfhosted_to_apify.description: No managed scheduler with retries+webhooks out-of-box
gaps_selfhosted_to_apify.mitigation: pg_cron + Edge Function with idempotency keys
Sentry (already in stack) + structured pino logs + Better Stack dashboards
Only invest above 30-50k pgs/mês trigger; defer self-hosting to Wave B

gaps_selfhosted_to_apify.description: No Actor marketplace shortcuts (e.g. brasil-scrapers/quinto-andar-api commoditized)
gaps_selfhosted_to_apify.mitigation: Apify+self-hosted hybrid: keep marketplace Actors on Apify, self-host only custom MercadoLivre/ImovelWeb workers

gaps_selfhosted_to_apify.description: DataDome / Cloudflare on ImovelWeb hard either way, but Apify has more aggregate empirical tuning
gaps_selfhosted_to_apify.mitigation: Wave A keep ImovelWeb deferred; Camoufox plan B if self-hosted in Wave B

gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.description: Proxy locked to Apify Proxy at $8/GB (premium)
gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.mitigation: Above 50k pgs/mês, residential cost dominates — switch to self-hosted with multi-vendor proxy ($1.75-5/GB)

gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.description: Per-CU compute scales linearly (no efficiency from owning the VPS)
gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.mitigation: Trigger migration when monthly CU spend > ~R$ 1.000
Code under Actors is Crawlee TS already; refactor is mechanical

gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.description: Concurrent runs capped by plan tier (32 on Creator)
gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.mitigation: Sufficient for Zona Sul volumes; upgrade or self-host if cap is hit

gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.description: Vendor risk — Apify pricing or terms can change unilaterally
gaps_apify_to_selfhosted.mitigation: Keep Crawlee code portable (already TS) so migration path stays open

summary.interpretation: Apify wins on TODAY'S volumes via managed-services premium. Self-hosted wins on FUTURE volumes via marginal cost. The two are NOT mutually exclusive — they should be a SEQUENCE keyed to volume.
